game_meta.name: Dota 2
game_meta.tagline: 5v5 MOBA — destroy the enemy Ancient. Deeper mechanic ceiling than LoL (denying, couriers, neutral items, illusion mechanics).
game_meta.character_vocab: heroes (120+, 5 picked per match across 5 positions, numbered 1-5 from hard-carry to position 5 support)
game_meta.round_format: BO1, BO3, or BO5 (tournament). Single match ~30-60 minutes. No rounds.
key_mechanics: Last-hitting + denying (deny own creeps to starve enemy XP)
Position 1-5 system: carry / mid / offlaner / soft support / hard support
Roshan timer + Aegis of the Immortal
Neutral items (drops from neutral camps every X min)

dota-map.name: The Dota Map
dota-map.notes: Single map. Two sides (Radiant SW / Dire NE), three lanes, jungle camps, Roshan pit.

Position 1 Carry.notes: Farms gold/XP, scales into late-game wincon. Safe lane.

Position 2 Mid.notes: Solo mid lane. Rotates to side lanes earliest.

Position 3 Offlaner.notes: Off lane. Tanks the lane, initiates fights.

Position 4 Roamer.notes: Roams + early ganks + neutral item priority.

Position 5 Hard Support.notes: Wards the map, peels carry, sacrifices farm.

herald_guardian: Buying TPs only after the fight
legend_plus: Bad rotation reads on enemy mid

review_template.style: Specific over generic. Reference visible HUD elements, in-game timers, and concrete tactical concepts. Never say "play smart" or "use abilities better".

vocabulary: standard tactical vocabulary varies by game; defer to game_meta.character_vocab and key_mechanics for terms
